transcript:
Dana: Hi Marcus, good to reconnect. How did the proposal land with the team?
Marcus: Generally positive. The COO is on board with the direction. The sticking point is the security review - our team flagged that they need SOC2 Type II documentation and answers on data residency before we can sign.
Dana: Got it. We can absolutely provide the SOC2 report and a data-residency overview. Anything on pricing?
Marcus: Pricing is fine at the forty-eight thousand we discussed. No change there. We're not expanding scope.
Dana: Great. So the path forward is the security packet. Next step - I'll send the SOC2 report and the data-residency doc to your security team, and you'll route it for review.
Marcus: Exactly. If that clears, we're looking at signing before the end of July.
Dana: Perfect, that matches the close date we have. I'll get the security packet over today.
